basics.name: Anand Bhaskaran
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Technical Lead | Startup Mentor | MBA | AI
basics.summary: Proven Senior Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience in developing robust, scalable backend systems using Java and Spring Boot. Led initiatives that automated builds and deployments, enhancing efficiency and reducing delivery times by 30%. Expertise in DevOps practices and continuous delivery, fostering high-performing teams and innovative solutions.

work.name: Beekeeper AG
work.summary: As Technical Lead, I drive the innovation of scalable systems and AI-powered features while enhancing platform reliability for millions of users.
highlights: Led architectural design and launch of Employee Referral System (99.99% SLA) — generated $1.5M+ revenue including $500K ARR through agile methodologies.
Spearheaded design and development of Beekeeper's Templating Engine — reduced setup time by 90% and enhanced user engagement, now powering 15% of platform assets.
Engineered robust search interface accommodating 10M+ users — significantly elevated user engagement and accelerated platform adoption rate.
Assembled and led high-performing remote teams, fostering a culture of maintainable code and customer-centric solutions.
Collaborated with product managers and data engineers on A/B experiments, deriving data-driven insights for product iterations.
Designed and deployed Generative AI translation systems, translating 12K+ key-value pairs, saving $337K in costs.
Built AI-driven stream template system for sales to auto-generate customized content, boosting demo speed and personalization.

work.name: Tenity
work.summary: I guide startups on technical strategy and scalability, ensuring they develop impactful solutions.
highlights: Conducted thorough evaluations of emerging technologies for startups, fostering growth and enabling their scalability.
Advised multiple startups on technical hiring and AI adoption, optimizing their operational efficiency.

work.name: Dronistics
work.summary: As a founding engineer, I developed an autonomous drone delivery system successfully utilized in 500+ last-mile deliveries.
highlights: Architected and delivered complete software/cloud stack, enabling seamless integration with partners like Unilever, showcased at CES Las Vegas.
Built autonomous delivery platform powering 500+ successful drone deliveries while ensuring operational scalability.
Engineered real-time flight control APIs and optimization algorithms — reducing delivery times by 40% with a 99.5% safety record.

work.name: EPFL — Laboratory of Intelligent Systems (Robogen)
work.summary: I led the engineering of Robogen, an innovative platform for robot morphology and control system co-evolution.
highlights: Spearheaded migration to AWS, securing research credits and gaining recognition on the AWS Research Blog.
Supervised 20+ master's students in AI and robotics projects, contributing to impactful research.
Led the development of an open-source platform, enhancing collaboration in AI and robotics research.

education.institution: Quantic School of Business and Technology

publications.name: Microfrontends: Revolutionising Frontend Architecture
publications.summary: Technical deep-dive presentation demonstrating how microfrontend architecture enables scalable, team-autonomous development while reducing deployment complexity for enterprise applications.

publications.name: From Idea to Product
publications.summary: Comprehensive methodology presentation on accelerating product development cycles through lean validation, rapid prototyping, and data-driven decision making in startup environments.

publications.name: The Blueprint for Building High‑Impact Teams
publications.summary: Leadership methodology article outlining proven strategies for assembling and scaling high-performing engineering teams through psychological safety, clear accountability, and growth-oriented culture.

awards.title: TI India Analog Design Contest Winner

projects.name: PulseView - AI Market Intelligence
highlights: Built a real-time stock market analysis platform utilizing AI agents to generate and explain trading signals.
Transitioned from a personal tool to a public offering for retail traders and investors.
Focused on explainable AI to enhance clarity in financial analysis.

projects.name: Obermatt - Fintech Product Development
highlights: Enhanced CI/CD pipelines with Docker implementation, reducing deployment times by 30%.
Introduced agile methodologies, increasing team productivity by 20%.
Developed strategic roadmaps that boosted customer satisfaction.

projects.name: SwissNRI - Cross-border Fintech Platform
highlights: Launched the first platform addressing complex cross-border financial challenges for Indian nationals in Switzerland.
Led product development from concept to MVP in 3 months, establishing key partnerships.
Implemented a compliance-first design to meet critical regulatory requirements.

_jobApplication.jobDescription:
Du arbeitest gerne in einem dynamischen Team und agilen Umfeld und bringst Leidenschaft für performante Backend-Systeme und automatisierte Infrastruktur mit? Dann werde Senior Application Engineer bei Terravis und gestalte aktiv mit, wie wir intelligente, skalierbare Lösungen entwickeln.

Als führende digitale Plattform setzt Terravis Massstäbe in der domänenübergreifenden digitalen Abwicklung von Grundstückgeschäften und vernetzt Finanzindustrie, Notariats- und Grundbuchwesen für sichere, effiziente und rechtskonforme Immobilienprozesse.

In deiner Rolle als Senior Application Engineer entwickelst du robuste und skalierbare Backend-Komponenten. Automatisierte Builds und Deployments auf OpenShift gehören zu deinem Alltag. Du trägst massgeblich dazu bei, Infrastruktur zu automatisieren, Services zu optimieren und Continuous Delivery-Prozesse zu stärken – für maximale Stabilität, Sicherheit und Effizienz.

 
 

Das sind deine Aufgaben 
Entwicklung und Betreuung des Terravis-Web-Services
Konzipieren und gestalten von neuen Features für das Terravis-Backend
3rd Level  Support: Untersuchen von Produktionsproblemen und Durchführen von Ursachenanalysen
Dev Ops: Erstellen und Warten von automatisierten Software Builds (Gitlab) und Deployment (ArgoCD, Helm) auf eine OpenShift-Umgebung
 
Das bringst du mit 
Abgeschlossene Informatikausbildung und mehrere Jahre Erfahrung in der Entwicklung von Java-Anwendungen mit Spring-Boot
Web-Services ( Spring-WS, REST) sowie Data Management (MS SQL, Spring Data)
Sicherer Umgang mit Entwicklungswerkzeugen (IntelliJ, Maven,  Git, Gitlab, ArgoCD, Helm, Openshift , Linux, Bash)
Sehr gute Deutsch- und gute Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift
_jobApplication.notes: All the output should be in English
